---
title: "Test report after emptyDrops"
author: "Kevin Rue"
date: "2025-02-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(bluster)
library(ggrastr)
library(scater)
library(scran)
library(scuttle)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Load the SCE object

```{r}
sce <- readRDS("../../results/emptydrops/WPPm048hrs_rep1.rds")
sce
```

## Log-normalise counts

Necessary ahead of PCA.

```{r}
sce <- logNormCounts(sce)
```

## Highly variable genes

Preferable to facilitate PCA.

```{r}
dec <- modelGeneVar(sce)
hvg <- getTopHVGs(dec, n = 1000, var.threshold = 0)
length(hvg)
```


## Dimensionality reduction

```{r}
sce <- fixedPCA(sce, rank = 50, subset.row = hvg)
sce <- runUMAP(sce, dimred = "PCA")
sce
```
```{r}
plot_data <- cbind(
  reducedDim(sce, "UMAP"),
  colData(sce)
)
ggplot(plot_data, aes(UMAP1, UMAP2)) +
  rasterise(geom_point(size = 0.01)) +
  theme_bw()
```
